characters.name: Belle
characters.profile_text: You move through life with a curious mind and a generous heart. Books, ideas, and the small wonders of the everyday delight you. You ask questions other people forget to ask, and you trust your own judgment even when a town full of voices is telling you to be ordinary. Loyalty is a quiet kind of courage for you — you stay when others would leave, and you see kindness in places others miss it. You believe people can grow, and that belief, more than anything, tends to bring out the best in those around you.
characters.short_description: A bookish dreamer who looks past appearances to see who someone truly is.

characters.name: Mulan
characters.profile_text: You feel responsibility deeply, especially toward family and people who have looked out for you. When something needs to be done, you don't wait for permission — you train, prepare, and step into the role yourself. You're more comfortable with effort than with attention, and you'd rather earn respect than perform for it. You know that real bravery isn't loud; it's the quiet decision, made over and over, to keep showing up. Underneath your discipline is a warm, witty side that emerges once people get to know you.
characters.short_description: A duty-driven protector who would rather act than be admired.

characters.name: Moana
characters.profile_text: Something in you is always tugging toward what's just out of sight. You love your home and the people in it, and that's exactly why you're willing to go past the reef when it matters — to bring back what's been lost or to fix what no one else will. You navigate by feel as much as by logic, trusting yourself in motion and learning fastest when the stakes are real. You're warm, stubborn, and honest, and you have a knack for getting people to remember who they used to be.
characters.short_description: A natural wayfinder pulled toward the horizon and the questions there.

characters.name: Tiana
characters.profile_text: You believe in earning what you have, and you're not afraid of slow, steady work. Your dreams are concrete — you can picture the place, the people, the moment — and you're disciplined enough to keep grinding when other people would coast. You're skeptical of shortcuts and a little wary of charm, which makes the trust you give people meaningful when you give it. The lesson life keeps offering you is that effort is necessary, but love and friendship are what make the destination worth reaching.
characters.short_description: A focused builder who turns long hours into something that lasts.

body.summary: Classic Walt Disney Animation heroines spanning 1937 to today. Each princess embodies a defining mix of bravery, wit, kindness, and curiosity — from Snow White's gentle optimism to Moana's voyaging resolve.
body.title: Which Disney Princess are you?

aliases: Which Hogwarts House Are You In

characters.name: Gryffindor
characters.profile_text: You lead with your gut and your conscience, in roughly that order. When you see something that isn't right you tend to step in, even when staying out would be easier. You take risks that other people call reckless and you call necessary, and your willingness to be visible — to put your name on a stand — is part of what draws people to you. You can be impulsive, and you don't always think three moves ahead, but the tradeoff is that you act when others freeze, and that decisiveness is its own kind of magic.
characters.short_description: Brave, bold, and quick to act when something matters.

characters.name: Slytherin
characters.profile_text: You play a longer game than most. Where others react, you observe — gathering information, weighing leverage, and waiting for the moment that actually moves the board. You're ambitious without apologizing for it, and you protect the small circle of people you've chosen with a fierceness that often surprises them. You appreciate elegance, in plans and in people, and you can be cutting when you need to be. The myth that your house is just selfish misses the point: you simply refuse to spend your loyalty on people who haven't earned it.
characters.short_description: Ambitious, strategic, and unmistakably loyal to the people you choose.

characters.name: Ravenclaw
characters.profile_text: You're powered by curiosity. New ideas are oxygen for you, and you can lose hours to a problem that has caught your attention — a puzzle, a topic, a strange question that won't quit. You value cleverness but also originality; you'd rather be wrong in an interesting way than right in a boring one. You can be a little aloof when you're thinking, and you sometimes forget that other people don't live inside your head — but when you decide to share what you've found, you do it with real generosity, the way someone hands you a book they loved.
characters.short_description: Curious, inventive, and happiest when an idea has just clicked.

characters.name: Hufflepuff
characters.profile_text: You are the person who actually shows up. Friends, family, work, the people in line behind you — you treat them all with the same baseline of care, and over time that consistency becomes a quiet kind of power. You believe in fairness as a practice, not just a principle, and you'll do unglamorous work for as long as it takes to do it right. You're often underestimated by people who confuse warmth with softness, but the people who actually know you know better: when you commit, you commit, and you're not easily moved off it.
characters.short_description: Loyal, fair, and the steady hand that keeps a group together.

body.summary: The four houses of Hogwarts — Gryffindor (courage), Slytherin (ambition), Ravenclaw (wit), and Hufflepuff (loyalty) — reflect the values the founders prized most.
body.title: Which Hogwarts House are you in?

aliases: Which Star Wars Character Are You

characters.name: Luke Skywalker
characters.profile_text: You start out wanting more than the small horizon you were given, and once the door opens you go through it. You take training seriously — not because you love discipline but because you want to be useful when it counts — and you trust people more than your situation rationally warrants. That trust, even in moments where it costs you, ends up being your most powerful tool. You believe people can change, sometimes when no one else does, and that belief tends to be vindicated in ways the cynics around you never see coming.
characters.short_description: An optimistic seeker who keeps choosing hope under pressure.

characters.name: Han Solo
characters.profile_text: Officially, you're in it for yourself. You run your own ship, you don't take sides, and you don't owe anyone anything — that's the line you sell, and you sell it well. The truth, if anyone watches long enough, is that you keep coming back for the people you pretend not to care about. You're quick, funny, and surprisingly competent under pressure, and your timing — both for jokes and for showing up at the last second — is uncanny. The galaxy is full of people who talk a bigger game than they play; you're the rare one who undersells what you'll actually do.
characters.short_description: A self-styled cynic whose heart keeps showing up uninvited.

characters.name: Leia Organa
characters.profile_text: You were trained for responsibility before you were old enough to choose it, and somewhere along the way you stopped resenting that and started using it. You think clearly under fire, you pick your battles, and you don't waste energy on people who need to be impressed. When the room is panicking, you're the one assigning roles — not because you're cold but because you've already done the math on what helps and what doesn't. You hold grief in private and command in public, and the people who follow you do so because you have never once asked them to take a risk you weren't already taking.
characters.short_description: A born leader who keeps her composure exactly when others lose theirs.

characters.name: Yoda
characters.profile_text: You've been around long enough to see most things twice, and rather than turning bitter you've turned playful. You ask questions that sound silly until people realize they've been answering them about themselves all afternoon. You believe in mastery slowly earned, in restraint over force, and in the quiet conviction that letting go is harder — and braver — than holding on. You teach by example more than by instruction, and the people you mentor remember the small moments long after the speeches have faded.
characters.short_description: A patient teacher who hides depth behind warmth and humor.

body.summary: From the heroic Jedi of the Old Republic to the rogue smugglers of the Outer Rim, the Star Wars saga is full of figures who chart their own moral course in a galaxy in conflict.
body.title: Which Star Wars character are you?

characters.name: Athena
characters.profile_text: You think before you move and you move precisely when you do. People mistake your composure for distance, but it's actually attention — you're collecting information about the situation and the people in it, and you'll use that information to shape outcomes others didn't see coming. You value craft, study, and fairness, and you don't have much patience for showy bravery that hasn't done its homework. When you commit to a side you do so with full force, but you choose that side carefully, and the people you defend tend to be defended very well.
characters.short_description: Strategic, principled, and most dangerous when she has had time to think.

characters.name: Apollo
characters.profile_text: You have an artist's metabolism and a healer's instinct, and you tend to live by whichever is louder that day. You're drawn to music, language, sunlight — anything with rhythm — and your moods can shift with the weather. You hold yourself to a high standard of clarity and beauty, and you're kindest to people in pain because you remember what disorder feels like. There's a streak of pride in you that you don't always own out loud, and your real growth tends to come when you let other people teach you something you thought you already knew.
characters.short_description: Bright, expressive, and pulled toward whatever is beautiful or true.

characters.name: Artemis
characters.profile_text: You don't need a crowd to feel like yourself. You like being outdoors, alone or with a small chosen group, and your attention sharpens when the work is hands-on and consequential. You protect things — people, animals, places, principles — and you do it without asking for credit. You're not interested in being domesticated by anyone else's expectations of who you should be, and that fierce independence is also why the loyalty you do give means so much. You take aim slowly and rarely miss.
characters.short_description: Independent, focused, and the surest hand in the room when it matters.

characters.name: Hermes
characters.profile_text: You move fast and notice everything. You're the one people call when something has to happen across town, across systems, across worlds — you find the path, talk your way through what needs talking through, and arrive intact with the package and a story. You bridge groups that don't speak each other's language, and you're a little bit of a trickster, which is part of how you keep the work interesting. You're more sentimental than people guess; you just don't slow down long enough to make a show of it.
characters.short_description: Quick, curious, and the one who actually gets the message there.

body.summary: The Olympians — Zeus, Hera, Athena, Apollo, Artemis, Aphrodite, Ares, Hermes, and the rest — each personify a slice of human nature, from cunning strategy to wild revelry.
body.title: Which Greek god are you?

characters.name: Fire
characters.profile_text: You run a little hot — in a good way. You bring energy into spaces that were a bit flat before you got there, you say what you mean, and you'd rather burn out trying than coast through. People feel braver when you're around because you treat your own confidence like something you can lend out. You can be impulsive and you sometimes argue for sport, but you cool off as fast as you flare up, and you don't really hold grudges. The world keeps giving you challenges that look impossible until you decide they aren't.
characters.short_description: Bright, driven, and the one who lights up a room on the way in.

characters.name: Water
characters.profile_text: You meet the world by reading it first. You're calmer than you look, and your strength comes from being able to take the shape of the moment without losing yourself. You're patient with people, but you're not soft — you can wear down a position over time the way water wears down stone. You're more sentimental than you let on; the people, places, and rituals you love, you love quietly and for years. When pressure rises, you go still and clear, and that's when the people around you realize you've actually been steering the whole time.
characters.short_description: Adaptive, patient, and the one who finds a way around almost anything.

characters.name: Electric
characters.profile_text: Your brain runs a little quicker than the conversation, and you've spent a lifetime learning to slow down enough to be understood. You make connections other people miss, you crack jokes mid-sentence, and you'd rather try ten things badly than wait around to do one thing perfectly. You like novelty and you like motion, and you can get restless when life goes flat for too long. The flip side of all that voltage is that you care more than you show — you just process it on the way to the next thing.
characters.short_description: Fast, witty, and almost always five thoughts ahead.

characters.name: Psychic
characters.profile_text: You pick up on things other people miss — small shifts in tone, the thing someone almost said, the pattern under the noise. That perceptiveness can be exhausting, and you've had to learn when to look away. You think in webs more than in lines, and you're at your best when you can take an idea apart slowly, in your own time. People sometimes underestimate you because you keep your conclusions to yourself until you're sure of them, but the people who know you well have learned to trust your hunches; they've usually been right.
characters.short_description: Intuitive, observant, and the one who sees through what people are saying.

body.summary: Eighteen elemental Pokémon types — Fire, Water, Grass, Electric, Psychic, Dark, and more — each carry a distinct vibe and battle style. Your type reveals how you meet the world.
body.title: Which Pokémon type are you?
